title: Settings > Download Clients: yt-dlp configuration UI
description: Add a Settings > Download Clients settings page to configure yt-dlp. Currently the yt-dlp path and extra arguments are hardcoded or set by config file only. The UI should show: yt-dlp executable path (with test button that runs yt-dlp --version), additional arguments (extra flags appended to every download), maximum concurrent downloads (int, default 3). Backend: DownloadClientConfig stored in settings, exposed via /api/v1/config/downloadclient. This replaces the placeholder in the Settings sidebar. Frontend: new DownloadClientSettings.tsx page under /settings/downloadclient.

title: Phase 1: MVP - Creator/YouTube Tracking + Video Download
description: Core MVP: Add creators (YouTube), discover their channels, list videos, download via yt-dlp, organize files for Plex. Creator is the primary entity users interact with.
close_reason: All 10 dependencies complete. MVP is fully implemented.

title: Global search: creators and content
description: Add a search bar (e.g. in the top nav) that searches across all creators by name and all content by title. Results should be grouped by type (creators vs content) and link directly to the creator page or content detail.
design:
## Test Plan

### Search bar
1. Appears in top nav or prominent position on all pages
2. Keyboard shortcut (e.g. /) focuses the search bar

### Creator results
1. Type creator name → matching creators appear in results
2. Partial match → results update incrementally (debounced)
3. No matches → 'No results' state shown
4. Click creator result → navigates to creator detail page

### Content results
1. Type video title → matching content rows appear grouped under 'Content'
2. Members-only content → shown with lock icon in results
3. Click content result → navigates to creator page and highlights/scrolls to the item

### Combined
1. Query matches both creator and content → both groups shown
2. Results ordered: creators first, then content
3. Esc key closes search dropdown and clears input

title: Creator page: reorder channels within a creator
description: Allow the user to drag-and-drop (or use up/down buttons) to reorder channels within a creator's detail page. Store the sort order on the Channel model and persist it. Channels should render in user-defined order.
design:
## Test Plan

### Reorder
1. Drag channel A above channel B → order persists after page reload
2. Use up/down buttons (if implemented) → same persistence check
3. Single channel creator → reorder controls hidden or disabled
4. Reorder then refresh creator → order unchanged after refresh

### Edge cases
1. Add a new channel → appended at bottom of user-defined order
2. Delete middle channel → remaining channels keep their relative order
3. Two creators with channels → reordering one does not affect the other

title: Channel content table: filter by type, membership, status, word search
description: Add filter controls above the content table in each channel section: content type (Video/Short/VoD/Live/Upcoming), membership (members-only toggle), status (Downloaded/Missing/Unwanted/etc.), and a free-text word search against the title.
design:
## Test Plan

### Type filter
1. Select 'Video' → only Video rows shown; other types hidden
2. Select multiple types → union shown
3. Clear filter → all rows shown

### Membership filter
1. Toggle members-only → only rows with isMembers=true shown
2. No members content in channel → toggle produces empty list

### Status filter
1. Select 'Downloaded' → only downloaded rows shown
2. Select 'Missing' → only missing rows shown
3. Combine type + status → intersection shown

### Word search
1. Type 'ASMR' → rows with 'ASMR' in title shown; case-insensitive
2. Clear search → all rows restored
3. No matches → empty state shown
4. Filters and search combine (AND)

title: Create ArchivalSettings page component and hook
description: Create frontend/src/Settings/Archival/useArchivalSettings.ts with ArchivalSettingsModel (globalPriorityKeywords, defaultRetentionDays) and useManageArchivalSettings hook. Create frontend/src/Settings/Archival/ArchivalSettings.tsx with two FieldSets: Priority Keywords (text input with help text) and Retention (number input, 0 = never delete). Pattern: UISettings.tsx / useUiSettings.ts.

title: Membership lock icon doesn't update live after refresh
description: After a RefreshCreator command completes and sets MembershipStatus=Active on the channel, the lock icon in CreatorChannelSection does not update without a page reload. The DB and API both return the correct value (membershipStatus: 'active'). Multiple mechanisms tried: SignalR channel event invalidation, prevRefreshingRef tracking in CreatorChannelSection, commandFinished callback, and refetchChannels() in CreatorDetail on isRefreshing false transition — none reliably update the component. Root cause unknown; may be a TanStack Query cache not being picked up, the SignalR channel event not firing, or a React rendering issue.

title: Refactor: IMetadataSource provider pattern
description: Replace hardcoded YouTube integration with IMetadataSource : IProvider abstraction. Modeled on ThingiProvider/Notifications pattern. Enables adding Twitch and future sources without touching core command executors.
close_reason: IMetadataSource provider pattern fully implemented. YouTube source merged into YouTube.cs, factory pattern routing, migration 235, API layer, all consumers rewired. dotnet build + yarn build both clean.

title: Restore Discord notification integration
description: Sonarr had a Discord notification provider under Settings → Connect that posts messages to a Discord webhook on events (download started, download complete, etc.). Restore this so Streamarr can post to a Discord channel on configurable events.
close_reason: Discord, Telegram, Plex notification providers fully implemented with frontend Connect settings page

title: Content sync service (replaces RSS sync)
description: Create ContentSyncService replacing RSS sync. Polls monitored creators' channels for new content via platform API. Runs through decision engine for quality checks. Queues downloads via yt-dlp. Register as scheduled task in TaskManager (default: 15 min interval, configurable). Iterates Creator → Channels → new Content.
close_reason: RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor syncs monitored channels via yt-dlp, persists new content, queues downloads; registered as 60-min scheduled task in TaskManager

title: Creator list: filter by live now, active membership, missing videos
description: Add filter controls to the creator list page: (1) Live Now — show only creators with a channel currently live; (2) Active Membership — show only creators where at least one channel has MembershipStatus=Active; (3) Missing — show only creators that have wanted content not yet downloaded.
design:
## Test Plan

### Setup
- At least 3 creators: one with a live channel, one with active membership, one with missing content, one with none of the above

### Live Now filter
1. No live channels → filter produces empty list
2. One creator live → only that creator shown
3. Filter clears → all creators shown again

### Active Membership filter
1. Creator with MembershipStatus=Active → shown; others hidden
2. Creator with Unknown/None → hidden
3. Combine with Live Now → intersection of both sets

### Missing Videos filter
1. Creator with wanted > downloaded → shown
2. Creator fully downloaded → hidden
3. All creators fully downloaded → empty list

title: Remove foreign language / i18n localization support
description: Streamarr is English-only. Remove all non-English localization JSON files from src/Streamarr.Core/Localization/Core/ (keep only en.json), simplify LocalizationService to remove language switching, and clean up any related UI for language selection. Also rename any Sonarr-referencing i18n keys (e.g. FailedToLoadSonarr → FailedToLoadStreamarr).
close_reason: Deleted 44 locale files, simplified LocalizationService to English-only, renamed all Sonarr i18n keys, removed language selector UI

title: Content detail modal on creator detail page
description: When clicking a content row in the CreatorChannelSection table (on the creator detail page), open a slide-in or modal panel with full content details. The modal should show: full-size thumbnail, title, description (full text, not truncated), air date, duration, platform URL (clickable link to YouTube/Twitch), download status, file path (if downloaded), file size. Action buttons: Download Now (trigger yt-dlp for this item), Mark as Ignored (sets IsMonitored=false), Open File Location (if downloaded). Backend: no new endpoints needed—detail view reuses existing Content and ContentFile data.

title: Add YouTubeApiKey to IConfigService and ConfigService
description: Add YouTubeApiKey string property to IConfigService interface and implement in ConfigService using GetValue/SetValue pattern (default empty string). This setting stores the YouTube Data API v3 key used for content metadata fetching.

title: Tests: RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor
description: Unit tests for RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor (content sync logic) covering: new content is inserted, existing content is updated, content no longer in feed is not deleted, content status transitions (Missing→Downloaded, etc.), and any title/priority filter logic that gates whether content is marked Wanted vs Unwanted.

title: Activity: download queue page
description: Adapt Sonarr's Activity > Queue page for Streamarr. Show yt-dlp downloads currently in progress, including content title, creator, channel, progress percentage, and estimated time. Backend: expose /api/v1/queue endpoint returning in-progress download records. Frontend: add Activity > Queue route and page component with an auto-refreshing table (poll every 5s or use SignalR). Each row: thumbnail, content title, creator, channel, status (downloading/paused/failed), progress bar, size. Allow cancelling a download. Sidebar nav: add Activity section with Queue sub-item.

title: Creator page: set custom avatar
description: Add a button on the creator detail page to upload or enter a URL for a custom avatar image, overriding the auto-fetched thumbnail. Store the override on the Creator model.
design:
## Test Plan

### URL input
1. Enter valid image URL → thumbnail updates on save; persists after reload
2. Enter invalid URL → error shown, previous image unchanged
3. Clear custom avatar → reverts to auto-fetched thumbnail from platform

### Upload (if implemented)
1. Upload valid image (JPG/PNG) → shown as avatar
2. Upload oversized file → error or resize
3. Upload non-image file → rejected with error

### Interaction with auto-refresh
1. Run Refresh Creator → custom avatar is NOT overwritten by platform thumbnail
2. Platform thumbnail changes → custom avatar still takes precedence

title: Support concurrent live stream recordings
description: Currently the command queue serializes all DownloadContentCommand executions, so clicking Download on a second live stream while another is recording results in it being queued and blocked behind the first. Live stream recordings can run for hours, so concurrent recording is needed. The fix likely involves running DownloadContentCommand (for live streams) outside the standard single-threaded command executor, or introducing a dedicated live-recording slot that allows multiple parallel yt-dlp processes for live content only.
close_reason: Removed RequiresDiskAccess from DownloadContentCommand; bumped THREAD_LIMIT to 5

title: Creator search bar on Creator Index page
description: Add a text search/filter input to the CreatorIndex page toolbar so users can quickly find creators by name as their library grows. The filter should be client-side (filter the already-loaded creators array by title.toLowerCase().includes(query)) and debounced at ~200ms. Place the search input in the PageToolbarSection, left-aligned before the View/Sort/Filter menus. Clear button (×) appears when input has text. The search filter combines with the existing monitored/unmonitored filter.
close_reason: Creator search bar implemented in previous session

title: Wire ArchivalSettings into AppRoutes and Settings nav
description: Add /settings/archival route to frontend/src/App/AppRoutes.tsx importing ArchivalSettings. Add Archival link and summary text to frontend/src/Settings/Settings.tsx.

title: Manual refresh and download-missing buttons on creator detail page
description: Add action buttons to the creator detail page header (CreatorDetail.tsx): (1) Refresh — triggers a RefreshCreatorCommand for this specific creator via POST /api/v1/command with {name:'RefreshCreator', creatorId:X}, which re-syncs channel metadata and discovers new content. Shows spinner while running. (2) Download Missing — triggers a SearchMissingCommand that queues yt-dlp downloads for all monitored+undownloaded content for this creator. Also add a per-channel Refresh button on each CreatorChannelSection header. These replace having to go to System > Tasks for manual triggers.

title: Phase 2: Twitch Integration + Live Stream Recording
description: Add Twitch channel support and live stream detection/recording. Builds on Phase 1 infrastructure.
close_reason: All Phase 2 tasks complete: Twitch metadata source, live stream monitor/recorder, and streaming notification events.

title: Twitch metadata source (Helix API)
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/Twitch/TwitchProxy.cs. Implement IProvideChannelInfo and ISearchForNewChannel using Twitch Helix API: GET /users, /search/channels, /videos, /streams. TwitchSettings.cs with ClientId/ClientSecret and OAuth token management.
close_reason: Twitch metadata source implemented: Helix API with OAuth2, VODs+live via sentinel pattern, health check, all StyleCop clean

title: Live stream monitor and recorder
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/LiveStreams/. LiveStreamMonitorService polls channels every 1-2 min for live status. On detection: create Content entry (ContentType.LiveStream), queue yt-dlp with --live-from-start. LiveStreamRecordCommand for long-running process management. Handle reconnection on stream interruption. Post-process recordings (remux, metadata).

title: Streaming notification events
description: Create LiveStreamStartedEvent, LiveStreamEndedEvent. Adapt existing notification events: ContentGrabbedEvent (from EpisodeGrabbedEvent), ContentDownloadedEvent (from EpisodeImportedEvent), ChannelAddedEvent (from SeriesAddedEvent). Update notification message templates for existing providers.
close_reason: Implemented OnGrab, OnLiveStreamStart, OnLiveStreamEnd, OnChannelAdded notification events across INotification, NotificationBase, NotificationDefinition, NotificationService, Discord, Telegram, NotificationResource. Published from DownloadContentCommandExecutor and ChannelService. Migration 239 adds 4 new DB columns.

title: Import existing creator library from filesystem
description: Allow users to point Streamarr at an existing folder of creator content. Each subdirectory becomes a creator; video files with YouTube IDs in their names are matched to YouTube videos via the API, channels are created, and the files are linked as downloaded content.

title: Frontend branding update
description: Update package.json name field, index.ejs title and branding. Replace window.Sonarr with window.Streamarr globally. Update hardcoded Sonarr strings in frontend.
close_reason: Frontend fully rebranded: window.Streamarr, headers, templates, CSS vars, package.json, external URLs

title: Creator detail actions + channel download settings
description: Add Refresh/Delete/Add Channel toolbar buttons to creator detail page. Add per-channel settings panel with content type toggles (Videos/Shorts/Livestreams) and title keyword filter. Backend: DB migration 227, Channel model + resource fields, filter applied in RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor.

title: Add GlobalPriorityKeywords and DefaultRetentionDays to IConfigService
description: Add GlobalPriorityKeywords (string, default empty) and DefaultRetentionDays (int, default 0 = keep forever) to IConfigService interface and implement in ConfigService using GetValue/GetValueInt. Add under a new // Archival section.

title: Rename solution and project files
description: Rename Sonarr.sln to Streamarr.sln. Rename all .csproj files: NzbDrone.Core→Streamarr.Core, Sonarr.Http→Streamarr.Http, etc. Update Directory.Build.props: Product name, remove NzbDrone namespace remap, update conditionals.
close_reason: All solution/project files renamed from Sonarr/NzbDrone to Streamarr. Build verified clean (0 new errors).

title: Tests: ImportLibraryService
description: Unit tests for ImportLibraryService covering: scanning a root folder and matching files to existing Content records by YouTube ID in filename, creating ContentFile records for matched files, skipping already-imported files, handling files with no matching content, and path normalisation across OSes.

title: Restore Plex connect integration
description: Sonarr had a Plex notification/connect provider under Settings → Connect that triggers Plex library scans after a download completes. Restore this integration so that when a content file is imported, Streamarr notifies the configured Plex server to refresh the relevant library section.
close_reason: Discord, Telegram, Plex notification providers fully implemented with frontend Connect settings page

title: Add PriorityFilter and RetentionDays to Channel model and migration 228
description: Add PriorityFilter (string, default '') and RetentionDays (int?, nullable) to src/Streamarr.Core/Channels/Channel.cs. Create migration 228_channel_archival_rules.cs that adds these two columns to the Channels table. Pattern: identical to 227_channel_content_filters.cs.

title: Settings > Naming: simplify to single content naming format
description: The current Settings > Media Management > Naming section (MediaManagement/Naming/Naming.tsx) is inherited from Sonarr and contains TV-specific episode naming formats (Standard Episode Format, Daily Episode Format, Anime Episode Format, Season Folder Format, Multi-Episode Style). For Streamarr, replace this with a single Content File Name format with Streamarr-specific tokens: {Creator Title}, {Channel Title}, {Content Title}, {Air Date}, {Air Year}, {Quality Full}, {Quality Title}, {Content ID}. Update the backend NamingConfig model and FileNameBuilder to match. Remove the episode/season/series-specific tokens and validation.

title: Create YouTubeApiModels.cs with API v3 response types
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/YouTube/YouTubeApiModels.cs with C# classes for deserializing YouTube Data API v3 JSON responses: YoutubePlaylistItemsResponse, YoutubePlaylistItem, YoutubePlaylistItemSnippet, YoutubeResourceId, YoutubeVideosResponse, YoutubeVideo, YoutubeVideoSnippet, YoutubeVideoThumbnails, YoutubeVideoThumbnail, YoutubeVideoContentDetails, YoutubeVideoLiveStreamingDetails. Use System.Text.Json with PropertyNameCaseInsensitive.

title: YouTube metadata source integration
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/YouTube/. Implement IProvideCreatorInfo and ISearchForNewCreator interfaces. YouTubeProxy.cs using YouTube Data API v3 (channels.list, search.list, playlistItems.list, videos.list). YouTubeSettings.cs for API key config. Also use YouTube RSS feed for quota-free new video detection. Given a creator, discover their YouTube channel(s) and fetch content metadata. Create resource DTOs.
close_reason: YouTube metadata via yt-dlp: channel info, video listing, content type detection

title: Creator list: progress bar shows downloaded/wanted instead of downloaded/total
description: The progress bar on each creator card in the creator list currently shows downloaded vs total content count. It should instead show downloaded vs wanted (monitored content that passes filters), so users can see how complete their wanted library is.
design:
## Test Plan

### Setup
- Creator with a mix of Downloaded, Missing, and Unwanted content
- Verify wanted count = content rows where status=Missing or Downloaded (monitored, passes filter)

### Cases
1. Creator with 10 total, 6 wanted, 4 downloaded → bar shows 4/6, not 4/10
2. Creator with all content unwanted → bar shows 0/0 (or hides)
3. Creator with all content downloaded → bar shows full (wanted == downloaded)
4. Add new wanted content → bar denominator increases immediately after refresh
5. Change channel settings to unwant a type → bar denominator decreases

title: yt-dlp download client implementation
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/Download/Clients/YtDlp/. YtDlpClient extends DownloadClientBase<YtDlpSettings>. YtDlpProcessManager for spawning/monitoring yt-dlp processes. Parse progress via --progress-template JSON stdout. YtDlpSettings: BinaryPath, TempDownloadPath, CookieFile, EmbedMetadata, EmbedThumbnail, PreferredFormat, MaxConcurrentDownloads. Create RemoteContent model parallel to RemoteEpisode.

title: File organization with new naming tokens
description: Adapt FileNameBuilder for streaming content. New tokens: {Creator Title}, {Channel Title}, {Content Title}, {Content Id}, {Published Date}, {Year}, {Month}, {Content Type}, {Quality Title}. Default format: {Creator Title}/{Published Date} - {Content Title} [{Content Id}] {Quality Title}. Flat folder structure under creator (no channel subfolders). Update NamingConfig defaults.
close_reason: FileNameBuilder with tokens: {Creator Title}, {Channel Title}, {Content Title}, {Content Id}, {Published Date}, {Year}, {Month}, {Day}, {Content Type}, {Quality Title}. NamingConfig with defaults. Migration 226 resets NamingConfig table.

title: Channel content table: sort by type, status, duration, title, air date
description: Make the content table in each channel section sortable by clicking column headers: content type, status, duration, title, air date (currently only air date descending is supported).
design:
## Test Plan

### Column header sort
1. Click 'Title' header → sort A→Z; click again → Z→A
2. Click 'Air Date' header → newest first; click again → oldest first
3. Click 'Duration' header → shortest first; click again → longest first
4. Click 'Type' header → grouped by type alphabetically
5. Click 'Status' header → grouped by status
6. Active sort column shows direction indicator (▲/▼)

### Persistence
1. Sort selection persists while navigating within the page
2. Optional: persists across page reloads per-channel

### Edge cases
1. Null air date rows → sort to bottom when sorting by date
2. Null duration → sort to bottom when sorting by duration
3. Combined with filter → sort applies only to visible (filtered) rows

title: Phase 3: Plex Custom Metadata Agent
description: Separate Python-based Plex plugin for streaming content metadata. Reads NFO sidecars written by Streamarr. Lives in /plex-agent/ subdirectory.

title: NFO sidecar writer in Streamarr
description: Add StreamarrNfoService to src/Streamarr.Core/Extras/. Write tvshow.nfo in channel folders with channel metadata. Write {filename}.nfo per content file with video metadata. Generate during content import. Use KODI/Plex-compatible NFO schema.

title: Plex metadata agent (Python bundle)
description: Create plex-agent/Streamarr.bundle/Contents/Code/StreamarrAgent.py. Implement Agent.TV_Shows: channels as shows, year-months as seasons. Read NFO sidecars for metadata. Map channel avatar to show poster, video thumbnail to episode still.

title: Creator list: sort options (next live, counts, date added, size)
description: Add sort options to the creator list: next live time, downloaded count, wanted count, missing count (wanted minus downloaded), date added, size on disk. Currently only default (alphabetical/date-added) is supported.
design:
## Test Plan

### Sort directions
- Each sort option toggles asc/desc on second click
- Default sort is preserved on page reload (if persisted)

### Cases
1. Sort by downloaded count asc/desc → verify order matches actual downloaded counts
2. Sort by wanted count → verify order
3. Sort by missing count (wanted - downloaded) → verify order
4. Sort by date added → newest/oldest first
5. Sort by size on disk → verify order matches filesystem totals
6. Sort by next live → creators with no upcoming live go to bottom; soonest live first
7. Add a creator during sorted view → inserted in correct position or list re-sorts

title: Apply metadata source defaults to channels created during import
description: When the import process creates a new Channel via FindOrCreateChannel(), it hardcodes download flags (DownloadVideos=true, DownloadShorts=true, DownloadVods=true, Monitored=true). These should instead be inherited from the defaults configured on the matching MetadataSource (e.g. the YouTube source's channel defaults defined in MetadataSourceSettingsBase), so that user-configured source preferences are respected for imported content.

title: Create YouTubeSettings.tsx settings page component
description: Create frontend/src/Settings/YouTube/YouTubeSettings.tsx: FieldSet with legend 'YouTube Data API', single FormGroup with label 'API Key' and inputTypes.PASSWORD field for apiKey, SettingsToolbar with save button, help text 'YouTube Data API v3 key from Google Cloud Console'. Pattern: identical to UISettings.tsx.

title: Update RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor to pass channel.PlatformId
description: In src/Streamarr.Core/Creators/Commands/RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor.cs, update the GetNewContent call from (channel.PlatformUrl, channel.LastInfoSync) to (channel.PlatformUrl, channel.PlatformId, channel.LastInfoSync) to match the updated ICreatorMetadataService interface.

title: Twitch: reclassify Videos category
description: 'Videos' is not a meaningful Twitch category — it contains VODs, highlights, uploads, and clips which are distinct content types. Each should be a separate category or the label should match Twitch parlance.

title: Create RetentionCleanupCommand and executor scheduled daily
description: Create RetentionCleanupCommand.cs and RetentionCleanupCommandExecutor.cs in src/Streamarr.Core/Content/Commands/. Executor: for each Downloaded YouTube content item, resolve effective retention (channel.RetentionDays ?? config.DefaultRetentionDays). If 0, skip. If AirDateUtc is past the retention window, call IYouTubeApiClient.GetVideoDetails: empty = video gone, keep file; duration shrank >5% = mark Modified, keep file; otherwise = delete file via IDiskProvider, mark Expired. Register in TaskManager with 24*60 min interval. Depends on IYouTubeApiClient (streamarr-csv).

title: Create IYouTubeApiClient and YouTubeApiClient
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/YouTube/YouTubeApiClient.cs with IYouTubeApiClient interface and implementation. GetPlaylistItems paginates playlistItems.list stopping when publishedAt < since. GetVideoDetails batches video IDs in groups of 50 calling videos.list with part=snippet,contentDetails,liveStreamingDetails. Uses HttpClient.Send() (sync) to match codebase style. Throws InvalidOperationException on non-200 or missing API key. Quota: 1 unit/page for playlist, 1 unit/batch for videos.

title: Add PriorityFilter and RetentionDays to ChannelResource
description: Add PriorityFilter (string) and RetentionDays (int?) to ChannelResource in src/Streamarr.Api.V1/Channels/ChannelResource.cs and update both ToResource and ToModel mappers.

title: Creator, Channel, and Content API endpoints
description: Create Streamarr.Api.V1/Creators/. CreatorController: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/creator (primary entity). CreatorLookupController: GET /api/v1/creator/lookup?term= and ?url= (searches YouTube/Twitch for creators). ChannelController: GET /api/v1/channel (child of creator). ContentController: GET/PUT /api/v1/content. ContentFileController CRUD. Follow SeriesController pattern with SignalR. Create resource models.
close_reason: CreatorController, ChannelController, ContentController + resources. CreatorLookupController for YouTube discovery.

title: Tests: YtDlpClient
description: Unit tests for YtDlpClient covering: progress line regex parsing (percent/speed/ETA extraction), download destination regex, merger destination regex, already-downloaded regex, IsAvailable() returning true/false based on exit code, CancelDownload() killing the correct process and handling missing contentId gracefully, and CleanUpLiveFragments() merge ratio threshold logic.

title: Consider DB-level ON DELETE CASCADE for creator child tables
description: As more child entities are added to Creator (Channels, UnmatchedFiles, etc.), DeleteCreator must manually call delete on each. A future refactor could add ON DELETE CASCADE FK constraints via FluentMigrator and enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON on every SQLite connection. This would make cascade deletes automatic at the schema level with no application code needed. Only worth doing if the manual approach becomes cumbersome.

title: Tests: database migrations 225-232
description: Migration fixture tests for all Streamarr-authored migrations (225 through 232), following the existing pattern in Streamarr.Core.Test/Datastore/Migration/. Each fixture should verify that the schema changes apply cleanly from the prior migration state and that any data migrations produce the expected rows.

title: Frontend: Creator list and detail views
description: Create frontend/src/Creator/: Creator.ts interface, useCreator.ts React Query hooks, Index/ with table+poster+overview views, Details/ showing channels and content list. Create frontend/src/AddCreator/: URL paste input with YouTube/Twitch URL auto-detection, creator preview, options (root folder, quality profile, monitoring). Update navigation to show Creators as primary entity. Channel details shown within creator detail view.
close_reason: Creator index page, add creator modal with yt-dlp lookup, creator row with delete; types for Creator/Channel/Content; Creators in sidebar + routes

title: Update ICreatorMetadataService.GetNewContent to accept platformId
description: Add platformId string parameter to GetNewContent in src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/ICreatorMetadataService.cs. Signature: List<ContentMetadataResult> GetNewContent(string platformUrl, string platformId, DateTime? since = null). The platformId is the YouTube channel ID used to derive the uploads playlist ID (UC→UU prefix swap).

title: History: download history page
description: Adapt Sonarr's History page for Streamarr. Show a log of all completed, failed, and cancelled download events. Backend: History table (or reuse existing event log) with columns: contentId, creatorId, date, eventType (grabbed/downloaded/failed/ignored), sourceTitle, data (JSON blob). /api/v1/history endpoint with pagination and filtering. Frontend: /history route in sidebar. Table: date, content title, creator, channel, event type (with color badge), details. Allow marking as failed or re-triggering a download. Option to clear history.

title: Health checks for yt-dlp and YouTube API
description: YtDlpCheck.cs: verify binary available, check version. YouTubeApiKeyCheck.cs: verify API key configured and valid. Adapt RootFolderCheck for channel paths.
close_reason: Implemented YtDlpHealthCheck and YouTubeApiKeyHealthCheck. Auto-registered via DryIoc. Three new HealthCheckReason enum values added.

title: Download creator avatar locally on add
description: When a creator is added, download their avatar image from the remote URL (YouTube CDN) to local storage at {AppDataPath}/MediaCover/Creator/{id}/avatar.jpg, then update ThumbnailUrl to /MediaCover/Creator/{id}/avatar.jpg. Uses the existing MediaCoverMapper infrastructure for serving and IHttpClient.DownloadFile for fetching. Prevents reliance on external CDN URLs for avatars.

title: Replace YouTubeMetadataService.GetNewContent with API implementation
description: Refactor src/Streamarr.Core/MetadataSource/YouTube/YouTubeMetadataService.cs: inject IYouTubeApiClient, replace yt-dlp flat-playlist GetNewContent with API-based implementation. New flow: derive uploads playlist ID (UU+channelId[2..]), call GetPlaylistItems for video IDs+dates, call GetVideoDetails in batches, map to ContentMetadataResult using XmlConvert.ToTimeSpan for duration, liveStreamingDetails presence for Livestream type, duration<=60s for Short, else Video. SearchCreator and GetChannelMetadata remain on yt-dlp.

title: Wanted: monitored-but-missing content page
description: Add a Wanted page showing all monitored content that has no downloaded file. Adapts Sonarr's Wanted > Missing page. Backend: /api/v1/wanted/missing endpoint returning Content records where IsMonitored=true and no ContentFile with status=downloaded. Frontend: /wanted route under sidebar Wanted section. Table with columns: content title, creator, channel, air date, duration. Toolbar: Search (trigger download for selected/all), filter by creator. Clicking Search on a row triggers a yt-dlp download for that item.
close_reason: Wanted > Missing page implemented with backend endpoint, table UI, sidebar nav, and per-row download trigger

title: Add PriorityFilter and RetentionDays to channel settings panel
description: In frontend/src/Creator/CreatorChannelSection.tsx, add local state and UI inputs for priorityFilter (text, like titleFilter) and retentionDays (number, placeholder 'Use global default', empty = null). Include both in the save payload to useUpdateChannel.

title: Delete TV-specific code (Tv/, Indexers/, Parser/, SkyHook/)
description: Aggressively delete all TV-specific domain code: src/NzbDrone.Core/Tv/, Indexers/, Parser/, MetadataSource/SkyHook/, Download/Clients/ (all except base classes). Delete frontend: Series/, AddSeries/, Calendar/, Wanted/. Keep infrastructure intact.
close_reason: All TV-specific code deleted. Backend and frontend build clean. Stub models (Channel, Content, ContentFile) created.

title: Creator list: poster/grid view like Sonarr
description: Add a poster/grid view to the creator list page mirroring Sonarr's poster layout. Each card shows the creator thumbnail, name, and a progress bar. Toggle between poster and list view. Persist the preference.
design:
## Test Plan

### Toggle
1. Click poster view button → grid of poster cards appears; list rows disappear
2. Click list view button → list rows appear; poster grid disappears
3. Preference persists across page reload

### Poster card
1. Shows creator thumbnail, name, progress bar
2. Missing thumbnail → placeholder shown, no broken image
3. Click card → navigates to creator detail page
4. Monitored/unmonitored indicator visible

### Responsive
1. Grid reflows at narrow viewport (≥1 column always)
2. Poster view and list view both scroll correctly with many creators

title: Create useYouTubeSettings.ts settings hook
description: Create frontend/src/Settings/YouTube/useYouTubeSettings.ts with YouTubeSettingsModel interface (apiKey: string) and useManageYouTubeSettings hook using useManageSettings<YouTubeSettingsModel>('/settings/youtube'). Pattern: identical to useUiSettings.ts.

title: Add Expired and Modified values to ContentStatus enum
description: Add Expired = 5 (file deleted, still on YouTube, past retention, unchanged) and Modified = 6 (kept because YouTube video was shortened >5%, deletion risk remains) to src/Streamarr.Core/Content/ContentStatus.cs

title: Restore Telegram notification integration
description: Sonarr had a Telegram notification provider under Settings → Connect that sends messages via a Telegram bot on events (download started, download complete, etc.). Restore this so Streamarr can send Telegram messages on configurable events.
close_reason: Discord, Telegram, Plex notification providers fully implemented with frontend Connect settings page

title: Create YouTubeSettingsController and YouTubeSettingsResource
description: Create src/Streamarr.Api.V1/Settings/YouTubeSettingsResource.cs with YouTubeSettingsResource (ApiKey string property) and YouTubeSettingsResourceMapper. Create src/Streamarr.Api.V1/Settings/YouTubeSettingsController.cs with [V1ApiController('settings/youtube')] attribute extending SettingsController<YouTubeSettingsResource>. Pattern: identical to MediaManagementSettingsController (simplest example).

title: Update RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor to support priority keyword override
description: Inject IConfigService into RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor. Add MatchesPriorityKeywords helper that merges GlobalPriorityKeywords and channel.PriorityFilter. If a content item matches any priority keyword, skip all type and title filters and always add. Otherwise apply existing type/title filter logic. File: src/Streamarr.Core/Creators/Commands/RefreshCreatorCommandExecutor.cs

title: Creator index and detail UI improvements
description: Add poster view + view/sort/filter toolbar to creator index. Rewrite creator detail to group content by channel (like Sonarr seasons) with collapsible sections.

title: Twitch: detect active subscriptions for membership status
description: If the Twitch API or yt-dlp supports it, detect whether the authenticated user has an active subscription to a channel and reflect that in MembershipStatus. This enables the active membership filter and lock icon to work for Twitch.

title: Creator detail page
description: Add /creators/:id detail page showing creator info, channels, and content list. Backend: add GET /api/v1/content/creator/{creatorId} endpoint. Frontend: header with thumbnail/description, channels section, content table.

title: Twitch: rename Shorts to Stories
description: Twitch's equivalent of YouTube Shorts are called Stories. The UI and domain model should use 'Stories' terminology for Twitch channels instead of 'Shorts'.

title: Tests: YouTubeApiClient and YouTubeMetadataService
description: Unit tests for YouTubeApiClient (HTTP request construction, playlist item parsing, video detail mapping, TestApiKey success and failure) and YouTubeMetadataService (mapping YtDlp/API responses to Channel/Content domain models, thumbnail URL resolution).

title: Twitch: fix live stream detection
description: Live stream detection is not working correctly for Twitch channels. Needs investigation into how ContentType.Live is being set during Twitch metadata fetching.

title: Create ArchivalSettingsController and ArchivalSettingsResource
description: Create src/Streamarr.Api.V1/Settings/ArchivalSettingsResource.cs with GlobalPriorityKeywords and DefaultRetentionDays properties and a mapper. Create src/Streamarr.Api.V1/Settings/ArchivalSettingsController.cs with [V1ApiController('settings/archival')] extending SettingsController<ArchivalSettingsResource>. Pattern: identical to YouTubeSettingsController.

title: Rename C# namespaces NzbDrone→Streamarr
description: Rename all NzbDrone.* namespaces to Streamarr.* across all C# files using IDE refactoring. Key mappings: NzbDrone.Core→Streamarr.Core, NzbDrone.Common→Streamarr.Common, Sonarr.Http→Streamarr.Http.
notes: WIP: NzbDrone→Streamarr namespaces+classes DONE (commit 8da7865). Still TODO: Sonarr→Streamarr class symbols (~819 refs), file renames (git mv), non-.cs refs, remove RootNamespace hack, build verify.
close_reason: Renamed all NzbDrone/Sonarr namespaces, class symbols, assembly references, and string literals to Streamarr. Removed RootNamespace hack. Fixed SA1210 using-order issues. Build passes clean.

title: Import: handle unmatched files
description: Currently the import process only handles files that have a successful metadata match. Files that cannot be matched (unknown creator, unrecognized title format, missing metadata) are silently skipped or cause an error. The import should gracefully handle unmatched files — either moving them to an 'unmatched' folder, flagging them in the UI, or logging a clear warning — so users know content was found but couldn't be imported.

title: Create Channel, Content, ContentFile domain models
description: Create src/Streamarr.Core/Channels/ with Channel.cs (replaces Series), Content.cs (replaces Episode), ContentFile.cs (replaces EpisodeFile). Include enums: PlatformType, ContentType, ContentStatus, ChannelStatusType. Create ContentCategory (replaces Season). Create services: ChannelService, ChannelRepository, ContentService, ContentRepository, AddChannelService, RefreshChannelService.
close_reason: Creator/Channel/Content/ContentFile models complete with repos, services, events, enums, and TableMapping registration

title: Database migration for Streamarr tables
description: Create migration 226_streamarr_initial.cs: Creators table (Title, CleanTitle, SortTitle, Description, ThumbnailUrl, Path, QualityProfileId, Status, Monitored, Tags, Added, LastInfoSync), Channels table (CreatorId FK, Platform, PlatformId, PlatformUrl, Title, Description, ThumbnailUrl, Status, Monitored, LastInfoSync), Contents table (ChannelId FK, ContentFileId, PlatformContentId, ContentType, Title, Description, ThumbnailUrl, Duration, AirDateUtc, DateAdded, Monitored, Status), ContentFiles table (ContentId FK, RelativePath, Size, DateAdded, Quality JSON, OriginalFilePath). Add appropriate indexes.
close_reason: Migration 225: Creators, Channels, Contents, ContentFiles tables with indexes

title: Monitor toggle button on creator cards and rows
description: Add a quick monitor/unmonitor toggle to the creator poster card (CreatorPoster.tsx) and table row (CreatorRow.tsx), without requiring navigation to the detail page. Use the existing MonitorToggleButton component (Components/MonitorToggleButton.tsx). On click: PATCH /api/v1/creator/:id with {monitored: true/false} and optimistically update the UI. The toggle should not trigger navigation (stop event propagation). Show a bookmark icon (filled=monitored, outline=unmonitored) in the bottom corner of the poster card and in the Monitored column of the table.

title: Functional media management settings page
description: Replace TV-specific MediaManagement settings with Streamarr-native UI: Naming (NamingConfig via new /settings/naming endpoint), File Management (recycle bin, permissions), Root Folders
close_reason: NamingSettingsController+Resource for GET/PUT /settings/naming; rewrote MediaManagement.tsx with Streamarr-native naming+file mgmt sections; stripped TV-specific fields from useMediaManagementSettings

title: Manual scan: import files placed directly in creator directory
description: Users may place video files directly into a creator's folder (e.g. downloaded externally or copied manually). The app should support triggering a scan of a creator's directory that detects these files, matches them to known content entries, and imports them into the library — similar to Sonarr's 'Manual Import' or 'Rescan' workflow. Should be triggerable per-creator from the UI and/or on a schedule.

title: Reset API version to V1
description: Rename Sonarr.Api.V5 to Streamarr.Api.V1. Update VersionedApiControllerAttribute. Remove V3 API project entirely.
close_reason: Deleted V3 API project, renamed V5→V1 (project, namespaces, attributes, routes). Single API version at /api/v1/. Build passes clean. Integration.Test excluded from sln (V3-dependent, to be rewritten in Phase 1).

title: Phase 0: Foundation - Rename & Rebrand
description: Establish Streamarr identity by renaming all Sonarr/NzbDrone references. This must be completed before any feature work begins.
close_reason: Phase 0 complete: all Sonarr/NzbDrone references renamed to Streamarr across backend, frontend, and API

title: Tests: health checks (YtDlp + YouTubeApiKey)
description: Unit tests for YtDlpHealthCheck (returns Error when IsAvailable()=false, returns Ok when available) and YouTubeApiKeyHealthCheck (returns Warning when key is blank, returns Error when TestApiKey throws, returns Ok when key is valid).
close_reason: Done in prior session: YtDlpHealthCheckFixture + YouTubeApiKeyHealthCheckFixture

title: Wire YouTubeSettings into AppRoutes and Settings nav
description: Add /settings/youtube route to frontend/src/App/AppRoutes.tsx importing YouTubeSettings component. Add YouTube link and summary text to frontend/src/Settings/Settings.tsx settings index page.

title: Tests: RetentionCleanupCommandExecutor
description: Unit tests for RetentionCleanupCommandExecutor covering: content older than retentionDays is selected for cleanup, content still on YouTube (unmodified) transitions to Available status and file is deleted, content removed from YouTube transitions to Deleted, content modified on YouTube is skipped, content within retention window is skipped.

title: Recycle bin: move deleted files to temp folder instead of permanent delete
description: When content files are deleted (manually or by retention), move them to a configurable temporary/recycle folder instead of deleting them immediately. This gives a recovery window before files are permanently removed.

title: Add Expired and Modified status badges to content list
description: Extend getStatusLabel in frontend/src/Creator/creatorUtils.ts with ContentStatus.Expired (kind=WARNING, text='Expired') and ContentStatus.Modified (kind=WARNING, text='Modified'). Add .statusExpired (grey/muted) and .statusModified (orange) CSS classes to CreatorChannelSection.css and regenerate .d.ts.

title: Manually assign unmatched file to channel
description: From the unmatched files section on a creator detail page, allow the user to pick a channel and assign the file to it. The result is identical to a downloaded-then-source-deleted item: a Content + ContentFile record with Status=Downloaded, AirDate from the file creation date, and a thumbnail extracted from the video using ffmpeg. The UnmatchedFile record is deleted on success.
